# unifi_ap_group (Data Source)

Retrieves information about an existing UniFi AP group. Lookup by either id or name.

## Example Usage

### Lookup by Name

```hcl
data "unifi_ap_group" "default" {
  name = "Default"
}

output "ap_group_id" {
  value = data.unifi_ap_group.default.id
}
```

### Lookup by ID

```hcl
data "unifi_ap_group" "by_id" {
  id = "60a1b2c3d4e5f67890123456"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the AP group. Specify either id or name.
- `name` (String) The name of the AP group. Specify either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `device_macs` (Set of String) The MAC addresses of devices in this AP group.
